# Page Title

Short introduction explaining what this feature, tool, or concept does and why it matters to the user.

---

## What Is This?

Provide a clear, simple explanation of the feature or concept.

- What it is  
- Where it appears in the product  
- Who it’s for (if relevant)

Keep this section concise and user-focused.

---

## Why It Matters

Explain the value to the user.

- What problem does this solve?
- How does it help users work more effectively?
- When would someone use this?

---

## How to Use It

Provide step-by-step instructions in the order they occur.

1. Open **[location in product]**.
2. Click **[button or menu name]**.
3. Select **[option]**.
4. Configure the required settings.
5. Click **Save**.

Use imperative verbs (Open, Click, Select, Enter).

---

## Key Options and Settings

Describe important fields, toggles, or configuration choices.

| Setting | Description | When to Use |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| Option Name | What this controls | Example scenario |

Only include options that users need help understanding.

---

## Example

Provide a short, realistic usage example.

```
Example: A marketing team creates a dashboard to track campaign performance across channels.
```

---

## Tips and Best Practices

```
> [!TIP]
> Use this feature together with [related feature] for better results.
```

Add practical guidance that helps users succeed.

---

## Troubleshooting (Optional)

Include only if users commonly run into issues.

| Problem | Possible Cause | Solution |
|---------|----------------|----------|
| Feature not visible | Permission level too low | Ask an admin to grant Editor access |

```
You must have **Editor** or **Admin** permissions to use this feature.
```
